title: Version 5.1 — Orchestration Live
summary: **Patch ladder:** Codenames `Void` → `Bloom` per minor (`.0`–`.9`) — see patch table below.
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stageNode["5.1.0 Orchestration Live — GraphQL to contact.ai"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]

    stageNode --> contract

    stageNode --> surface
    stageNode --> data
    stageNode --> ops
    contract --> releaseGate

    surface --> releaseGate
    data --> releaseGate

flowchart LR
    app["contact360.io/app"]
    api["contact360.io/api GraphQL"]
    lambda["LambdaAIClient"]
    contactAi["contact.ai"]

    app --> api
    api --> lambda
    lambda --> contactAi
micro_gate: **Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter, `.1-.2` scaffold, `.3-.5` hardening, `.6-.8` integration, `.9` freeze/handoff.
